title: Crosshair Damage Indicator
description: The Crosshair Damage Indicator mod displays real-time damage numbers below your crosshair, enhancing combat feedback and strategy in Minecraft.
body:
![Crosshair Damage Indicator Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4d89a71bce7b7d93ab420c290b2cdd5f715b79a.png)

The Damage Indicator Below Crosshair mod for Minecraft is a highly useful and visually appealing addition to your gaming experience. This mod enhances the default HUD by displaying a damage indicator directly below the crosshair, providing instant feedback on the damage dealt to mobs and players.

#

### Key Features:

- **Instant Feedback:** See the amount of damage dealt with every hit without diverting your attention from the action.
- **Enhanced Combat Awareness:** Keep track of your combat effectiveness in real-time, making it easier to adjust strategies and improve your gameplay.
- **Clear and Intuitive Design:** The damage indicator is displayed in a clean and non-intrusive manner, ensuring it complements the existing HUD without clutter.
- **Compatibility:** Designed to work seamlessly with various other popular mods, ensuring a smooth integration into your modded gameplay.

#

### Benefits:

- **Improved Efficiency:** Quickly gauge the strength of your attacks and the health of your targets, helping you make faster and more informed decisions during combat.
- **Enhanced Immersion:** Enjoy a more immersive and engaging gameplay experience with real-time damage indicators enhancing the feedback loop.
- **Better Strategy Planning:** Utilize the instant feedback to refine your combat tactics, manage resources more effectively, and optimize your weapon and armor choices.

#

Whether you're a seasoned warrior or a novice explorer, the Crosshair Damage Indicator mod is an essential tool for anyone looking to gain a competitive edge in Minecraft. It transforms the way you interact with the game, making combat more intuitive, strategic, and rewarding.
